session.user: Run `ty check src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py` and report the results. Also run `ty check tests/unit/cli/commands/land/` and report results.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checking for both files and directories using `ty`.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Type check land command tests directory

session.tool_result: All checks passed! WARN No python files found under the given path(s)
session.assistant:
ty passed: src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py has no type errors
ty passed: tests/unit/cli/commands/land/ - no Python files found in directory (warning only, not an error)
Both type checks completed successfully. The first file has no type violations, and the second directory check found no Python test files to check (which may indicate the test directory structure is organized differently).
